heading: Definition
label: 170501 Definition
text: For purposes of this chapter, “State” includes the District of Columbia and the territories and possessions of the United States.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)17050136:2513., , .July 23, 1984Pub. L. 98–372, § 1498 Stat. 1241The words “the Commonwealth of Puerto Rico” are omitted as included in “the territories and possessions of the United States”.
